description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and angular contours. The body is robust, with a bullpup configuration that positions the magazine and action behind the trigger for a compact profile. It has a fixed stock integrated into the main body, and the barrel is relatively short, ending with a small muzzle device. The rifle is equipped with a compact optical sight mounted on top, and there are visible rails and attachment points for accessories. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, with some exposed mechanical components and ergonomic grips.
description: A compact, black bullpup rifle with a fixed stock, short barrel, and integrated optical sight, featuring a robust, modern tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel opening, compact muzzle device, and the angular, streamlined front profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bullpup configuration, fixed stock, short barrel, and mounted sight on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the integrated stock, rear sight area, and the overall compactness of the rifle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar features as view 1, with visible attachment points and ergonomic grip details.
